_meta.name: tc_champion
_meta.label: TC Champion  'Daily Driver'  (2ct · all regimes · 67% pass)
_meta.description: Safe TC eval config. Three-cylinder engine: IB breakout + pullback retest + dynamic scaling. v3.1: data-validated time gates — extended afternoon for breakouts (no_entry_after=2pm), retest window capped at 12:30 ET (afternoon retests 30% WR were drag), lunch skip extended to 1pm. Backtest-proven vs JSON v3.0: +36% P&L ($8,317 vs $6,125), better Sharpe (2.03 vs 1.91), better MaxDD ($-2,251 vs $-2,630). WFA: 4/6 windows profitable.
_meta.use_when: Starting a TC eval. Default choice when regime is unclear or mixed.
_meta.do_not_use_when: You want to minimize DLL risk above all else (use xfa_conservative instead).

risk_rules.note: If first trade of day loses and session_pnl < -500, close platform. Two 4ct stops in a row approaches DLL.

v31_changes.no_entry_after_hour: 12 → 14: afternoon breakouts 57% WR +$2,932 were blocked by noon cutoff
v31_changes.lunch_end_hour: new: 13 (aligned with tc_trader.py which was already correct)
v31_changes.retest_cutoff: new: 12:30 — afternoon retests 30% WR -$738 eliminated, morning retests kept (+$332)

pending_experiments.overnight_classifier_v2: TRENDING fix needed — current definition fires 1×/3yr. Redesign: overnight_position = (rth_open - overnight_low) / overnight_range; >0.75 = TRENDING_UP
pending_experiments.vwap_reclaim_second_entry: 0% WR on 4 trades (3yr). Parameters too tight or concept needs rethinking. Do not add until backtest shows >40% WR.
pending_experiments.gap_fill_skip: REJECTED — GAP_FILL_DOWN days are best-performing subset (48% WR, $100/trade). Never skip.
